name: file-upload-storage
description: Generic file upload, storage, and serving. HTTP Range support for large videos. HEIC->JPEG conversion. Custom folders with thumbnails.

envVars.name: UPLOADS_DIR
envVars.description: Absolute path where uploaded files are stored. Default: <DATA_DIR>/uploads

envVars.name: DATA_DIR
envVars.description: Absolute path for all app data (used as the base for uploads if UPLOADS_DIR is not set)

postInstall: 2. Create the uploads directory: mkdir -p $UPLOADS_DIR && chmod 777 $UPLOADS_DIR
3. UPLOADS_DIR must be writable by the Next.js process (in Docker — bind mount or named volume)
4. heic-convert has C++ deps — in Docker use a multi-stage build
